description: Gulf Coast fuel surcharge spiked +18% due to shipping disruption. Effective immediately for all Gulf Coast outbound lanes.
Port of Long Beach reporting 2-3 day delays on inbound containers due to labor action. West Coast outbound unaffected.
Retail scanner data shows mixed nuts category tracking +180% YoY for Thanksgiving week. Analyst consensus expects continued elevation through Week 51.
California almond harvest shortfall estimated at 12% below forecast. Spot prices up 9% week-over-week. Buyers advised to secure forward contracts.
